data.content: Revised test plan per plan review feedback. Key correction: unknown lease returns NOT_FOUND (not silent success). 6 test cases: (1) kind=note with knots repo happy path, (2) kind=noop no note appended, (3) unknown lease → NOT_FOUND error, (4) updateKnot fails → early return with lease retained, (5) kind=note with falsy note → block skipped, (6) kind=note on non-knots repo → block skipped.
